title: Burnham Adviser Urges Next PM to Consider Radical Tax Overhaul
title_cn: 伯纳姆顾问敦促下一任总理考虑彻底的税收改革
summary: A group of economists including Andy Burnham adviser Jim O’Neill have called for a wide-ranging overhaul to turbocharge Britain’s sluggish economy, with the former Greater Manchester mayor set to take another step toward Downing Street later this week.

title: Europe’s Heat Wave Is Bright Spot for China’s Portable AC Makers
title_cn: 欧洲热浪成为中国便携式空调制造商的亮点
summary: As heat records shattered across Europe in the last weeks of June and indoor temperatures rose to uncomfortable levels, many of the continent’s residents sought immediate relief in the form of portable air conditioner units.

title: The $2 Trillion Race for Control of Future Battlefields
title_cn: 2万亿美元争夺未来战场控制权的竞赛
summary: Cold War-sized nuclear stockpiles are out. Emergent technologies like hypersonics, AI, space weapons and drones are in. World powers are betting big that getting there first will give them an insurmountable edge.

title: Alibaba Gets Reprieve on Lobbying Ban Tied to DoD Blacklist
title_cn: 阿里巴巴因与国防部黑名单相关的游说禁令获得缓刑
summary: A federal judge ordered the Pentagon to give Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. a reprieve from a law that caused all of its lobbyists to drop it as a client while she considers the constitutionality of the measure, in a case set to test the US’s ability to curtail Chinese companies’ activities.

title: CFOs’ Biggest Second-Half Worries
title_cn: 首席财务官下半年最大的担忧
summary: Inflation is back at the top of the list. Plus, Philips’ Charlotte Hanneman on helium-free scanners and finding €1.5 billion in savings.

title: China Is Spending Big to Rival India's Buddhist Influence in Asia
title_cn: 中国正斥巨资抗衡印度佛教在亚洲的影响力
summary: As the Dalai Lama succession approaches, China is leveraging Buddhism to expand its influence across Asia, testing whether money and power can rival India’s role as the faith’s birthplace.

title_cn: 特朗普和普京谈话，风暴迫使 7 月 4 日活动撤离

title_cn: 7 月 4 日的酷热，美国人对美国的看法，更多
summary: Source: Bloomberg, 5:07

title: Tankers Cross Hormuz Via US-Protected Corridor
title_cn: 油轮通过美国保护走廊穿越霍尔木兹
summary: Western navies continue to say that the threat risk in the Strait of Hormuz is substantial and that the center of the strait has been mined, as ships try to avoid the attentions of Iran's military. Bloomberg's Michael Heath reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Asian Shares Rise as Tech Rebound Holds, Oil Slips: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 技术反弹持续、油价下跌，亚洲股市上涨：市场结束
summary: Asian shares advanced and US equity-index futures held onto Friday’s gains as technology stocks extended their rebound. Oil edged lower.

title: Gold Miner Genesis Makes Rival $3.9 Billion Bid for Vault
title_cn: 黄金矿工 Genesis 向竞争对手出价 39 亿美元收购 Vault
summary: Australian gold miner Genesis Minerals Ltd. has launched a A$5.6 billion ($3.9 billion) cash and stock bid for Vault Minerals Ltd., trumping a deal agreed earlier with rival Regis Resources Ltd.

title: Oil Drops as Hormuz Flows Persist and OPEC+ Flags Higher Supply
title_cn: 霍尔木兹油流持续存在且 OPEC+ 预示供应增加，油价下跌
summary: Oil fell as flows through the Strait of Hormuz persisted and OPEC+ signaled higher supplies, fanning concerns about a glut.

title: Korean Won Steady on First Day of 24-Hour Trading
title_cn: 韩元在 24 小时交易首日稳定
summary: The South Korean won was stable against the dollar after inching higher as the currency began its first day of 24-hour trading, marking a milestone in Seoul’s push to open its financial markets to global investors.

title: Ringgit May Rebound on Capital Flow Measures, Analysts Say
title_cn: 分析师称令吉可能因资本流动措施而反弹
summary: The ringgit is poised for a rebound after ending June as Asia’s worst performer, with measures to boost foreign-exchange inflows and strong economic fundamentals expected to support the recovery, analysts say.

title: Bankers Say Asia Loan Market to Stay Weak as War Saps Confidence
title_cn: 银行家表示，由于战争削弱信心，亚洲贷款市场将保持疲软
summary: Asia’s loan market is heading into the second half of the year with little sign of a rebound, according to bankers, as the fallout from the Iran war continues to suppress confidence among lenders and borrowers.

title: Chip Stock Bulls Count on Samsung to Soothe AI Trade Jitters
title_cn: 芯片股多头指望三星能缓解人工智能贸易紧张情绪
summary: A wild ride for global chip stocks in recent weeks has left investors looking for fresh validation of the artificial intelligence trade. Samsung Electronics Co. may provide just that on Tuesday.

title: Gold Steadies After Weekly Gain as Rate-Hike Worries Recede
title_cn: 随着加息担忧消退，金价在每周上涨后企稳
summary: Gold steadied after posting its first weekly advance since May, supported by reduced expectations that the US Federal Reserve will hike interest rates.

title: CATL Invests in New Zealand Firm to Develop Graphite From Wood
title_cn: CATL投资新西兰公司利用木材开发石墨
summary: Contemporary Amperex Technology Co. Ltd. is investing in a New Zealand-headquartered company that converts forestry byproducts into graphite for use in lithium batteries.

title: Sara Duterte Faces Impeachment Trial With Philippine Presidential Dream At Stake
title_cn: 萨拉·杜特尔特面临弹劾审判，菲律宾总统梦想岌岌可危
summary: Philippine Vice President Sara Duterte faces a contentious trial in the Senate from Monday, a case that could end her political career or leave her as the top contender to succeed archrival Ferdinand Marcos Jr. as president.

title: Trump’s War Means Higher Global Interest Rates for Years to Come
title_cn: 特朗普的战争意味着未来几年全球利率将会上升
summary: Donald Trump’s war against Iran may be over, but the repercussions for global monetary policy are here to stay.

title: 【今朝の5本】仕事を始める前に読んでおきたい厳選ニュース
title_cn: 【今早5篇】精选上班前必读新闻
summary: ホルムズ海峡、鴻海精密工業、4.7兆円の大型上場、消費税引き下げ、原油相場一変

title: Australia Built a Gas Export Empire. Now the Backlash Is Here
title_cn: 澳大利亚建立了天然气出口帝国。现在强烈反对已经到来
summary: Australia’s liquefied natural gas exporters should be riding high on a A$20 billion ($14 billion) sales windfall from the conflict in the Middle East. Instead, their good fortune has triggered a wave of public backlash.

title: How This Major Grocery Store Chain Became a Cult-Favorite
title_cn: 这家大型杂货连锁店如何成为狂热分子的最爱
summary:
Aldi has long been known for its low prices even on items like wagyu ground beef. But the European grocery giant also has a loyal fanbase that follows its famed aisle of limited-time, unexpected finds.

US Chief Commercial Officer Scott Patton joins Joe Weisenthal and Tracy Alloway on the Odd Lots podcast to discuss the opening of Aldi's new Times Square location, its cult-favorite "Aisle of Shame" and its social media group that has garnered over 4 million followers. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Hardcore History’s DanCarlin Explains: Where Do We Go From Here?
title_cn: 《硬核历史》的 DanCarlin 解释道：我们该何去何从？
summary:
This Independence Day marks the 250th anniversary of America. But with an increasing amount of polarization and conflict, is this holiday able to bring the country together?

Dan Carlin, host of Hardcore History, joins Max Chafkin on this bonus episode of the Everybody's Business podcast to answer the question, “Have we been through this before?” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bond Traders Watch for Treasury Auctions, June Fed Minutes
title_cn: 债券交易员关注国债拍卖、六月美联储会议纪要
summary: The US bond market faces a test of investor demand for longer-dated maturities, with auctions of 10- and 30-year Treasuries highlighting an otherwise light week for economic events.

title: The Supertanker Tycoon Making Millions on Hormuz Shuttle Runs
title_cn: 超级油轮大亨通过霍尔木兹航天飞机赚取数百万美元
summary: Just a few weeks into the war, one of the Persian Gulf’s top oil producers quietly began sneaking its crude out of the Strait of Hormuz. Before long, the covert project became so successful that the United Arab Emirates was already approaching its pre-war rate of flows through the waterway by the time the US and Iran signed their interim peace deal.

title: EasyJet Agrees to Castlelake’s Latest Bid Topping £5 Billion
title_cn: EasyJet 同意 Castlelake 最新出价，最高 50 亿英镑
summary: EasyJet Plc agreed in principle to a takeover offer of more than £5 billion from Castlelake LP, which swooped in as the UK budget carrier was reeling from soaring jet fuel prices and suppressed demand after the Iran war.

title: New York Thunderstorms Raise Flood Risk as Heat Dissipates
title_cn: 热量消散，纽约雷暴增加洪水风险
summary: New York City will have a cooler, soggier Sunday now that the massive heat dome across the US East that taxed power grids and snarled transit has started to crack, while lingering high temperatures in Washington and across the Mid-Atlantic triggered air quality warnings.

title: Germany’s Second Chance for Growth Rebound Starts Now
title_cn: 德国第二次增长反弹机会现在开始
summary: German data in the coming week showing the cumulative impact of the Iran war will set the stage for the government’s latest bid to awaken animal spirits in Europe’s biggest economy.

title: Bloomberg This Weekend 07/05/2026
summary: The news doesn’t stop when markets close. Hosts David Gura, Christina Ruffini and Lisa Mateo bring clarity, context and a bit of humor to the weekend’s biggest headlines, LIVE from New York. Joined by NATO Deputy Supreme Allied Commander Europe UK Air Chief Marshal John Stringer, America 250 Commission Reginald Browne, Journalist & “The Almighty Dollar” Author Brendan Greeley, Politico Reporter & Co-Author of New York Playbook Madison Fernandez and 7th Generation Beam Family Master Distiller Fred Noe III and 8th Generation Beam Family Master Distiller Freddie Noe IV. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Pointed News Quiz | Food & Beverage, Disclosures, Movies
title_cn: 针对性新闻测验 |食品与饮料、披露、电影
summary: David Gura, Christina Ruffini, and Lisa Mateo of “Bloomberg This Weekend” play Pointed! Wager your points, leverage your bets and answer wisely. A new quiz is available to play each week on Bloomberg.com (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Court Term Reflects Reagan, Not Trump, Priorities
title_cn: 法庭任期反映的是里根而非特朗普的优先事项
summary: Bloomberg Supreme Court reporter Greg Stohr says the court's latest term largely advanced long-standing conservative legal priorities rooted in the Reagan era, while rejecting several Trump-specific initiatives, including broad tariff powers. Joining David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend, Stohr says the justices left unresolved questions over presidential authority to remove Federal Reserve officials, signaled potential future debate over birthright citizenship and agreed to hear major challenges to state assault weapons bans next term. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: World Cup Attendance Sets Record
title_cn: 世界杯上座率创纪录
summary: The USMNT remains competitive heading into its Round of 16 match against Belgium despite the suspension of striker Folarin Balogun, while France remains the tournament favorite led by Kylian Mbappé. Bloomberg News Senior Sports Reporter Randall Williams joins David Gura and Christina Ruffini on the couch of Bloomberg This Weekend and explains that the expanded FIFA World Cup has shattered attendance records and delivered a significant tourism and economic boost to host cities across the US, with packed stadiums and fan zones driving spending. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil, Gas Tankers Cross Hormuz Via Oman-Side Route After U-Turns
title_cn: 石油、天然气油轮掉头后经阿曼一侧路线穿越霍尔木兹
summary: Oil and gas shipping along a US-protected corridor in the Strait of Hormuz showed signs of recovering Sunday, a day after a batch of vessels performed unexplained U-turns and detours in the vital energy corridor.

title: America250 Looks Beyond July 4 Celebrations
title_cn: America250 超越 7 月 4 日庆祝活动
summary: America250 Commissioner Reginald Browne joins Bloomberg This Weekend and says the congressionally created initiative met its goal of engaging Americans in the nation's 250th anniversary celebrations and views the commemoration as an ongoing effort that will continue beyond this year's events. Browne explains to hosts David Gura and Christina Ruffini how private sponsors helped offset a federal funding shortfall and describes the Trump administration's Freedom250 initiative as complementary rather than competitive, broadening participation in the anniversary. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SK Hynix Seeks Access to AI Investors in $29 Billion US Listing
title_cn: SK 海力士寻求 AI 投资者参与 290 亿美元的美国上市
summary: This week’s $29 billion US stock-market listing for SK Hynix Inc. may be the biggest-ever first-time share sale by a foreign company, but it isn’t just about raising cash. It’s also about competing in the hottest corner of the global stock market — memory chips used in AI computing.

title: Parents Weigh New Trump Accounts for Newborns
title_cn: 父母权衡特朗普对新生儿的新说法
summary: Parents can now begin contributing to newly launched Trump Accounts, which provide a $1,000 government-funded investment for eligible children born between 2025 and 2028. Bloomberg's Sarah Foster joins David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend and explains that financial advisers still generally favor 529 plans for education savings and that questions remain about the new accounts' tax treatment, withdrawal rules and future investment options. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: By The Way: Interesting Headlines You May Have Missed July 4th Week
title_cn: 顺便说一句：您可能错过了 7 月 4 日周的有趣头条新闻
summary: Pony beers, household chores robots, 'bare nails' trend, and a new screen-time helper: Lisa Mateo shares with David Gura and Christina Ruffini the headlines explaining these topics that you and they may have missed this week. Watch Bloomberg This Weekend, Saturday and Sundays 7am EST. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: South Korea Eyes Growth Fund From Chip Tax Windfall
title_cn: 韩国着眼于芯片税意外收入增长基金
summary: South Korea is looking at creating an investment fund using excess tax revenue from its burgeoning semiconductor industry to finance long-term economic growth, a senior government official said.

title: UK to Toughen Up Political Donation Rules in Latest Crackdown
title_cn: 英国将在最新的镇压行动中加强政治献金规则
summary: Political donors will need to wait a year after returning to the UK before they can give more than £100,000 ($133,510) as part of a proposed crackdown on offshore political finance that threatens to hit Nigel Farage’s Reform UK.

title: Netflix Viewers Are Abandoning Shows After One Season
title_cn: Netflix 观众在观看一季后就放弃观看剧集
summary: Netflix’s biggest hits are losing more than half of their audience after one season

title: Hyundai Motor Showcases Humanoid at World Cup in Robotics Push
title_cn: 现代汽车在机器人世界杯上展示人形机器人
summary: Hyundai Motor Co. showcased its Atlas humanoid robot at the 2026 FIFA World Cup, highlighting its technical progress on football’s biggest stage as the South Korean automaker gears up for mass production and factory deployment.

title: AI Poses Biggest Security Challenge of Decade, UK’s Cooper Warns
title_cn: 英国库珀警告称，人工智能带来了十年来最大的安全挑战
summary: The world must urgently develop guardrails to contain the threat posed by artificial intelligence, Britain’s foreign secretary is set to warn.

title: Universal’s Latest ‘Minions’ Delivers $61 Million in Debut
title_cn: 环球影业最新电影《小黄人》首映票房收入 6100 万美元
summary: Minions & Monsters, the seventh film in the animated franchise depicting the yellow, mischievous creatures who speak in expressive gibberish, was the highest-grossing movie over the July 4 holiday weekend, with $61.4 million in US and Canadian box office sales.

title: Semiconductor Stocks Slide Amid AI Spending Concerns
title_cn: 由于人工智能支出担忧，半导体股票下跌
summary: Bloomberg Technology & Strategic Industries Senior Editor Mike Shepard says semiconductor stocks have come under pressure as investors question whether the rapid pace of AI infrastructure spending can be sustained beyond 2026, despite continued commitments from major technology companies. Shepard also explains to hosts of Bloomberg This Weekend David Gura and Christina Ruffini SK Hynix's planned US ADR debut will give American investors easier access to one of the world's leading AI memory-chip suppliers while helping fund the company's continued expansion. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Micron Breaks Ground on $9 Billion Japan Fab Expansion
title_cn: 美光耗资 90 亿美元的日本晶圆厂扩建工程破土动工
summary: Micron Technology Inc. on Saturday broke ground on the expansion of its factory in western Japan, a ¥1.5 trillion ($9.3 billion) undertaking to produce advanced memory chips.

title: India Tells Meta to Remove Child Abuse Content from Instagram
title_cn: 印度要求 Meta 从 Instagram 上删除虐待儿童内容
summary: India notified Meta Platforms Inc. that it needs to remove sexual content involving children from its platforms including Instagram, marking the latest regulatory headache for the US tech giant.

title: Nvidia Supplier Hon Hai’s Sales Beat on Continued AI Demand
title_cn: 英伟达供应商鸿海的销售额因持续的人工智能需求而增长
summary: Nvidia Corp.’s server assembly partner Hon Hai Precision Industry Co. reported a bigger-than-expected 40% jump in quarterly sales and said AI demand is growing further.

title: India’s CG Semi Starts Production With 200 Million Chips
title_cn: 印度CG Semi开始生产2亿颗芯片
summary: India’s CG Power & Industrial Solutions Ltd.’s new semiconductor unit has started production with an annual capacity of 200 million chips, Prime Minister Narendra Modi said Saturday, marking a fresh milestone in the country’s goal to build a domestic chip industry and gain a foothold in the global supply chain.

title: China Issues Guide for Registering International Science Groups
title_cn: 中国发布国际科学团体注册指南
summary: China issued guidance for establishing international scientific organizations in the country, setting out registration requirements for nonprofit groups focused on scientific cooperation, exchange and governance.

title: China Envisions AI, Karaoke and Coffee at Cinemas
title_cn: 中国设想电影院中的人工智能、卡拉 OK 和咖啡
summary: AI agents, karaoke and coffee shops may appear at Chinese cinemas under new guidelines that encourage theaters to expand beyond traditional film screenings.

title: Local Lenders Set to Supercharge Crypto Trading in Germany
title_cn: 当地贷方将加强德国的加密货币交易
summary: The cryptocurrency market in Germany is expected to gain significant momentum in the coming months as millions of people will soon be able to trade virtual currencies directly through their local banks, without having to go through specialized third-party platforms.

title: SK Hynix Is Said to Weigh 0.5% Fee Payout in Mega ADR Offering
title_cn: 据称 SK 海力士在大型 ADR 发行中考虑支付 0.5% 的费用
summary: SK Hynix Inc. is considering paying about 0.5% of the proceeds from its US listing — one of the largest share sales ever — to banks working on the deal, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: China Proposes Expanding E-Commerce Law Scope, Platform Rules
title_cn: 中国提议扩大电子商务法范围和平台规则
summary: China released draft amendments to its e-commerce law that would expand coverage beyond platforms and merchants, and revise rules governing the digital economy.

title: Vietnam Gambles on $4 Billion Port to Check China's Naval Power
title_cn: 越南豪掷40亿美元修建港口遏制中国海军力量
summary: The project in the south comes as concerns mount over Beijing’s influence in Cambodia, and its increasingly dominant position in the South China Sea.

title: Trump Heads to NATO Summit to Meet Zelenskyy, Face Wary Allies
title_cn: 特朗普前往北约峰会会见泽伦斯基，面对警惕的盟友
summary: President Donald Trump will meet with Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy at a NATO summit in Turkey on Wednesday that will be charged with tension over the US leader’s views on Greenland, European defense spending and the Iran war.

title: Progressive Mallory McMorrow Suspends Michigan Senate Campaign
title_cn: 进步派马洛里·麦克莫罗暂停密歇根州参议院竞选活动
summary: State Senator Mallory McMorrow suspended her campaign for Michigan’s open Senate seat, setting up a two-person Democratic primary fight between Representative Haley Stevens and progressive Abdul El-Sayed.

title: Trump Takes Center Stage for America’s 250th Independence Day
title_cn: 特朗普成为美国第 250 周年独立日的焦点
summary: President Donald Trump put himself center stage for America’s historic 250th Independence Day, using the milestone to promote his political priorities. The celebrations faced severe disruptions as erratic weather battered the East Coast. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Chile’s Economy Rebounding in June, Quiroz Tells La Tercera
title_cn: Quiroz 告诉 La Tercera，智利六月经济反弹
summary: Chile’s economy reached a turning point in June and will mount a recovery in the second half of the year, Finance Minister Jorge Quiroz said in an interview published on Sunday.

title: Ukraine Says It Hit Power Sites in Russia-Annexed Regions
title_cn: 乌克兰称袭击了俄罗斯吞并地区的电力设施
summary: Ukraine said it attacked 16 substations in Crimea and and other Russian-occupied regions over the past 48 hours, deepening an energy crisis in and around the Black Sea peninsula.

title: Anti-Migrant Protests Draw Thousands Across South Africa
title_cn: 南非各地数千人举行反移民抗议活动
summary: Thousands of people joined anti-migrant protests in South Africa on Tuesday, watched over by a massive police contingent that was deployed to prevent violence and intimidation.

title: Socialist Gains Test Democratic Party Unity
title_cn: 社会主义的成果考验民主党的团结
summary: Victories by Democratic Socialist candidates are intensifying debate over the Democratic Party's ideological direction, as Dem leaders seek to balance a broader coalition while avoiding internal divisions ahead of the midterm elections. Joining Bloomberg This Weekend for this discussion are Bloomberg News White House Correspondent Jeff Mason, Bloomberg Opinion Columnist Gautam Mukunda, and Politico Reporter Madison Fernandez who explain that Republicans are moving quickly to use the rise of democratic socialism as a political line of attack, creating a new messaging challenge for Democrats. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Cargo Ship Reports Attack Off Yemen, Adding to Red Sea Risks
title_cn: 货船报告也门遭遇袭击，增加红海风险
summary: A cargo vessel in the Red Sea reported that it came under attack from armed assailants on Sunday, the latest instance of security risks for ships transiting the Middle East region.

title: Nigeria Says South African Police Liable for Deaths of Citizens
title_cn: 尼日利亚称南非警方对公民死亡负有责任
summary: Nigeria has accused the South African authorities of criminal liability in the death of three of its citizens, warning that it will mobilize regional and international action to ensure those responsible for violence against foreigners are held to account.

title: Farage Retreats From View as Finance Probe Looms Large
title_cn: 随着金融调查的深入，法拉奇退出视野
summary: The loudest person in UK politics has suddenly gone quiet.

title: Putin, Trump Discuss Ukraine in Call Ahead of NATO Summit
title_cn: 普京与特朗普在北约峰会前通话讨论乌克兰问题
summary: Russian President Vladimir Putin and US President Donald Trump discussed Ukraine and the upcoming NATO summit in Turkey in a phone call Saturday, while Trump also spoke with his Ukrainian counterpart.

title: Trump Puts Himself Center Stage for Independence Day Celebration
title_cn: 特朗普将自己置于独立日庆祝活动的中心舞台
summary: President Donald Trump put himself centerstage for US Independence Day celebrations on Saturday with a speech and a show that celebrated the nation’s 250th anniversary and highlighted his own political priorities.

title: Australia to Sign Fiji Security Pact, Finalize India Uranium Export Deal, Newspaper Says
title_cn: 报纸称澳大利亚将签署斐济安全协议并敲定印度铀出口协议
summary: Australia is poised to sign a new security agreement with Fiji and finalize a deal to export uranium to India during a series of meetings this week, The Australian newspaper reported.

title: Trump Ramps Up War on Regulations With 702 Cuts in Pipeline
title_cn: 特朗普加大监管力度，削减 702 项计划
summary: The Trump administration is stepping up its efforts to cut red tape across the federal government, releasing a regulatory plan that would eliminate 702 existing administrative rules.

title: Treasury Rolls Out Currency Signed by Trump for Fourth of July
title_cn: 财政部推出特朗普签署的 7 月 4 日货币
summary: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent announced that US dollar-denominated bills featuring President Donald Trump’s signature were being introduced to commemorate the nation’s 250th birthday.

title: Trump Pardons Abramoff partner Adam Kidan, Texan Jack Harvard
title_cn: 特朗普赦免阿布拉莫夫合伙人亚当·基丹、德克萨斯州杰克·哈佛
summary: President Donald Trump on Friday pardoned Adam Kidan, a onetime business partner of disgraced former lobbyist Jack Abramoff, and Jack Harvard, a former mayor in Texas, a White House official said.

title: Netanyahu to See Trump in US Soon, Prime Minister’s Office Says
title_cn: 总理办公室称内塔尼亚胡很快将在美国会见特朗普
summary: Israel’s Benjamin Netanyahu said he and President Donald Trump agreed to meet in the US in the near future, according to a social-media post Saturday from the prime minister’s office.

title: Hungary Files Constitutional Bill to Oust Orban-Allied President
title_cn: 匈牙利提交宪法法案推翻欧尔班联盟总统
summary: Hungarian Prime Minister Peter Magyar’s government has filed a constitutional amendment to oust the Viktor Orban-allied president and roll back the former nationalist leader’s political influence.

title: Justice Department Defends Move to Drop Adani Criminal Charges
title_cn: 司法部为撤销阿达尼刑事指控的举措辩护
summary: The Justice Department defended its move to drop the criminal case against Gautam Adani, arguing that securities charges against the Indian billionaire never should have been brought in the first place.

title: Trump Seeks to Put Himself Center Stage for US Independence Day
title_cn: 特朗普寻求将自己置于美国独立日的中心舞台
summary: President Donald Trump will headline US Independence Day celebrations on Saturday with a speech and a show that seek to place him at the center of the nation’s 250th anniversary. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Putin Signs Tax Amendments Aiming to Boost Domestic Fuel Supply
title_cn: 普京签署税收修正案，旨在增加国内燃料供应
summary: Russian President Vladimir Putin signed a law to stimulate gasoline supplies to the domestic market.

title: Iran Rallies Millions For Funeral of Slain Leader Khamenei
title_cn: 伊朗集资数百万人参加被杀领袖哈梅内伊的葬礼
summary: Iran began a mass funeral for late Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei on Saturday, in a weeklong ceremony that’s expected to draw millions of mourners and serve as a show of strength for the Islamic Republic.

title: NYC Gets a Parade of Historic Military Ships to Mark America 250
title_cn: 纽约举行历史性军舰阅兵式庆祝美国成立 250 周年
summary: The traditional sailing vessels are distinguished by their towering masts and extensive rigging.

title: Iran’s Envoy to China Says Beijing to Get Hormuz Concessions
title_cn: 伊朗驻华特使表示北京将获得霍尔木兹海峡让步
summary: Iran’s ambassador to Beijing said China and other friendly nations will be granted “special considerations” when Tehran determines the level and nature of service fees charged to ships using the Strait of Hormuz.

title: French Aircraft Carrier Set to Head Home After Hormuz Deployment
title_cn: 法国航母在霍尔木兹海峡部署后启程回国
summary: French aircraft carrier Charles de Gaulle will return to its home port after a nearly two-month deployment near the Strait of Hormuz as an interim peace deal between the US and Iran eases tensions in the key waterway.

title: Mali Hit by Several Attacks Targeting Major Towns, Army Says
title_cn: 军方称马里主要城镇遭受多起袭击
summary: Mali has been hit by several attacks targeting military positions in major towns, including Gao and Sévaré, the army said.

title: Macron’s Budget Finale Augurs More Political Chaos in France
title_cn: 马克龙的预算结局预示着法国政治更加混乱
summary: The final budget showdown of Emmanuel Macron’s presidency is already gearing up to be France’s highest-stakes fiscal clash of the decade so far.
